---
title: "Contact"
toc: false
---

Pantelis Loupos  
Assistant Professor of Marketing and Business Analytics  
Graduate School of Management  
University of California, Davis  

Email: ploupos [at] ucdavis [dot] edu  
Website: [https://loupos.org](https://loupos.org)

## Profiles

- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=c9-8_qwAAAAJ&hl=en)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/loupos/)
